evals.prompt: I want to create a new skill that helps with writing commit messages from git diffs
evals.expected_output: A SKILL.md is created with correct frontmatter, clear instructions, and test cases are proposed

evals.prompt: Can you optimize the description for my existing research-helper skill so it triggers more reliably?
evals.expected_output: Description optimization loop is run using run_loop.py and a better description is produced

evals.prompt: Run evals on the skill I just wrote and show me the results in the viewer
evals.expected_output: Test prompts are executed, benchmark is aggregated, and generate_review.py opens the viewer
